overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing high-speed driving through a futuristic neon-lit city in a sports car. The vehicle navigates elevated highways between towering glass skyscrapers, passing industrial zones with smoke stacks and approaching a large dome structure under a cloudy sky.

events.description: vehicle accelerates from 64 km/h to 72 km/h while maintaining straight trajectory

agents.ego_description: accelerating along elevated highway, navigating between towering glass buildings while maintaining center lane position

notable_agents.action: other vehicles visible on parallel highway to the left, moving in same direction

entered.detail: holographic digital display showing speed and vehicle status with red and white interface elements
tall futuristic glass and steel buildings lining the left side of the highway
red structural supports and elevated highway infrastructure running parallel on the right
metal safety barrier separating the highway from the drop to lower levels

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic sports car driving on an elevated highway through a dense urban canyon. Glass skyscrapers rise on the left while red structural highway supports line the right. The vehicle accelerates smoothly from 64 to 72 km/h as it navigates the straight section of highway with sparse traffic visible on parallel roads.

events.description: highway opens up revealing industrial smoke stacks in the distance as city buildings recede
vehicle accelerates rapidly from 70 km/h to 87 km/h while beginning a rightward curve

agents.ego_description: accelerating aggressively and steering through a rightward curve on the elevated highway, approaching industrial zone

entered.detail: tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke visible on the horizon ahead
futuristic floating advertisement display on the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The highway opens into a wider corridor as the vehicle leaves the dense skyscraper canyon behind. Industrial smoke stacks appear on the horizon, signaling a zone transition. The car accelerates rapidly to 87 km/h while navigating a rightward curve, with red highway infrastructure now closer on the right side.

events.description: vehicle enters thick white smoke clouds emanating from the industrial complex ahead
speed fluctuates between 70-90 km/h while navigating through reduced visibility conditions

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through heavy smoke and haze, navigating the elevated highway with reduced visibility

entered.detail: large industrial facility with multiple smoke stacks and metallic structures
dense white smoke plumes from industrial stacks partially obscuring the view ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives directly through thick industrial smoke clouds that reduce visibility significantly. The industrial complex dominates the view ahead with multiple smoke stacks billowing white plumes. Despite the haze, the car maintains high speeds between 70-90 km/h on the elevated highway, with red structural elements still visible on the right.

events.description: vehicle emerges from smoke revealing a massive dome structure in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed toward a prominent dome landmark, maintaining steady course on the elevated highway

entered.detail: massive spherical dome building visible on the horizon, a prominent city landmark

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the industrial smoke, the view clears to reveal a massive dome structure dominating the horizon ahead. The highway continues straight toward this landmark with open sky visible above. The vehicle maintains a high speed of 82-90 km/h as it approaches the dome, with the industrial zone now behind and futuristic buildings visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a sports car as it travels from a dense urban canyon into a sprawling industrial zone and toward a massive landmark. It begins on an elevated highway flanked by towering glass skyscrapers and red structural supports, accelerating smoothly through the city center. As the vehicle navigates a rightward curve, the urban corridor opens up to reveal industrial smoke stacks on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the car plunges through thick, billowing white smoke clouds that momentarily obscure the view before the haze clears. Finally, the highway straightens out to reveal a massive dome structure dominating the horizon under an open sky, leaving the industrial complex behind.
